About Me

Md. Abdulla — SEO Expert

MA
Md. Abdulla
Professional SEO Expert | 3.5+ Years
Google SEO Local SEO GMB Expert Backlinks Technical SEO Top Rated

I am a Professional SEO Consultant & Business Growth Expert with 3.5+ years of experience helping businesses rank on Page 1 of Google. I have worked with 100+ clients across USA, UK, UAE, Canada, Australia and more.

My approach is 100% White-Hat, data-driven, and tailored to each business. I work on Fiverr & Upwork as a Top Rated freelancer and deliver measurable results within 30–60 days.

On-Page SEO 97%

What I Do

All SEO Services

Complete end-to-end SEO solutions to get your business ranking on the first page of Google.

🔍
Website Audit & Plan
Deep-dive analysis to identify all SEO issues and build a custom ranking roadmap.
  • Technical health check
  • Competitor analysis
  • Keyword research
  • 30/60/90-day action plan
📄
On-Page SEO
Meta tags, headers, keyword placement, internal linking and E-E-A-T optimization.
  • Meta title & description
  • H1/H2/H3 structure
  • Image alt & compression
  • Schema markup
⚙️
Technical SEO
Site speed, Core Web Vitals, schema, crawl error fixes and mobile optimization.
  • Page load < 2 seconds
  • Core Web Vitals pass
  • XML Sitemap & Robots.txt
  • Crawl error fixing
🔗
High Quality Backlinks
Do-follow, high DA backlinks from authority sites via white-hat methods.
  • Guest posts DA 40–90
  • Authority editorials DA 50+
  • Web 2.0 properties DA 30+
  • 100% permanent & manual
📍
GMB & Local SEO
Google My Business optimization and Google Maps 3-Pack ranking strategy.
  • GMB profile setup & verify
  • NAP consistency
  • 50+ local directory citations
  • Google Maps 3-Pack ranking
📱
Social Media SEO
Facebook, Instagram & LinkedIn growth management and social media SEO strategy.
  • Social media management
  • Profile SEO optimization
  • Audience growth strategy
  • Growth strategy

How I Work

My Working Process

01
Free SEO Audit
Complete website analysis — identify all technical & content issues affecting your rankings
02
Custom Strategy
Build a personalized 30/60/90-day roadmap with priority action items & KPIs
03
Implementation
Execute On-Page, Technical, and Off-Page optimizations with full transparency
04
Monitoring
Weekly GSC/Analytics tracking, rank reporting & continuous strategy adjustment
05
Reporting
Detailed monthly PDF report of all work done, rankings achieved & next steps
Engagement Models

Flexible Packages

All plans include a FREE SEO Audit. Contact for custom quotes.

Starter
Weekly Project
Ideal for small websites & startups
  • Unlimited Keywords — No keyword limit
  • Industry & Competitor Research
  • Complete Website Audit
  • Keyword Research & Search Console Audit
  • On-Page SEO — Meta Title, Meta Description, H1/H2 Tags
  • Web Content Writing & Internal Linking
  • Technical SEO — Sitemap, Robots.txt, Schema Setup
  • 404 Error Fixes, Canonical Tags, Indexing Fixes
  • Core Web Vitals Optimization
  • Off-Page — Social Bookmarking, Guest Blogging, Classified Submission
  • Google Analytics & Search Console Setup
  • Monthly Keywords Ranking Report

Full SEO Package
